title: alyssum montanum var. australe
intro: Alyssum montanum var. australe, also known as the Australian alyssum or mountain sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and improving sleep. Alyssum montanum var. australe can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
